Name: Human
HTML:
AncestryAct
Human
You were not born with magic or ancient lineage. You were born with will.
Once per Scene, when sheer determination could tip a stuck moment, try to push through with human grit and make a Snap Check.
Snap Check
1–3The moment slips — you overreach or misread the room.
4–8Choose 1: Press On — name what you're reaching for; take Boost 1 on your next check toward it · Find a Way — improvise an angle nobody else thought of; the GM names what opens · Rally — steady an ally beside you; they take Boost 1 on their next check
9+Choose 2 from the above.

Name: Elf
HTML:
AncestryAct
Elf
Something in you is older than this world, and it always notices.
Once per Scene, when old memory or a hidden detail might matter, try to attune to what others overlook and make a Snap Check.
Snap Check
1–3The thread fades — what you sensed stays out of reach for now.
4–8Choose 1: Listen — ask the GM one honest question about this Scene; they answer truthfully · Trace — name one detail others missed; the GM confirms if it's there · Stillness — read the room's weight; take Boost 1 on your next social check
9+Choose 2 from the above.

Name: Dwarf
HTML:
AncestryReact
Dwarf
You were carved from stone and stubbornness — and it shows.
Once per Scene, when a blow — physical, social, or emotional — would stagger you, try to hold your ground and make a Snap Check.
Snap Check
1–3The hit lands clean — you show the cost, and the Scene keeps pushing.
4–8Choose 1: Absorb It — take the hit without losing your footing; narrate what you refuse to show · Brace — plant your weight; take Boost 1 on your next check to stay in the fight · Answer Back — meet pressure with a short, grounded reply that shifts the tone
9+Choose 2 from the above.

Name: Halfling
HTML:
AncestryReact
Halfling
You've gotten away with things that should have ended you more times than you can count.
Once per Scene, when a check doesn't go your way, try to wriggle out with halfling luck and make a Snap Check.
Snap Check
1–3No reprieve — you own the bad beat and the Scene moves on.
4–8Choose 1: Slip Away — narrate how you get clear of the worst of it · Look Harmless — shrink the target; an enemy hesitates or looks elsewhere · Small Fortune — name one absurd small thing that softens the blow; the GM plays it fairly
9+Choose 2 from the above.

Name: Half-Orc
HTML:
AncestryReact
Half-Orc
You have been underestimated your whole life. You have learned to use that.
Once per Scene, when the Scene pushes you to yield or fall, try to refuse and make a Snap Check.
Snap Check
1–3You buckle — the pressure wins this beat.
4–8Choose 1: Stand — stay on your feet; narrate what keeps you there · Snarl — let your heritage show; one foe hesitates · Survive — draw on scars; take Boost 1 on your very next check
9+Choose 2 from the above.

Name: Tiefling
HTML:
AncestryAct
Tiefling
You carry something ancient and unholy in your blood. It is not a curse. It is yours.
Once per Scene, when your unsettling heritage could bend a social beat, try to lean on what you carry and make a Snap Check.
Snap Check
1–3The wrong kind of attention — folk pull back or misread you.
4–8Choose 1: Shadow — your presence shifts the mood; name what changes · Bargain — offer a small infernal favor; the GM names the price · Whisper — speak one truth that shouldn't be known; one listener reacts honestly
9+Choose 2 from the above.

Name: Dragonborn
HTML:
AncestryAct
Dragonborn
Every choice you make is an answer to what your bloodline means.
Once per Scene, when your draconic nature could unsettle or awe, try to let it surface and make a Snap Check.
Snap Check
1–3The tell backfires — others read it wrong or resist.
4–8Choose 1: Bearing — your stillness or voice changes the room's temperature · Ember — a small elemental tell; name it; the GM plays it fairly · Lineage — name what your blood remembers; ask one honest GM question
9+Choose 2 from the above.

Name: Gnome
HTML:
AncestryAct
Gnome
Your mind moves in directions that simply do not occur to anyone else.
Once per Scene, when an odd angle or trick could help, try to see what others miss and make a Snap Check.
Snap Check
1–3The bit falls flat — cleverness without payoff.
4–8Choose 1: Tinker — use something here in an unintended way; name how · Misdirect — draw eyes elsewhere; take Boost 1 on your next sneaky check · Spark — name the overlooked solution; the GM confirms if it could work
9+Choose 2 from the above.

Name: Half-Elf
HTML:
AncestryAct
Half-Elf
You belong to neither world completely. You have learned to make that a strength.
Once per Scene, when you could bridge two peoples or ways of seeing, try to read both sides and make a Snap Check.
Snap Check
1–3You miss the thread — neither side quite lands.
4–8Choose 1: Translate — name the thread between two opposed parties; they hear you · Soften — ease tension with the right tone; one NPC shifts their stance · Switch — lean elven grace or human drive; take Boost 1 on your next check
9+Choose 2 from the above.

Name: Orc
HTML:
AncestryAct
Orc
You are built for things that require more than most people have.
Once per Scene, when raw force or presence could shift the moment, try to bring orcish weight to bear and make a Snap Check.
Snap Check
1–3You overcommit — momentum turns against you.
4–8Choose 1: Rush — close distance; name what gives way before you · Hold — plant yourself; the Scene works around your mass · Roar — your voice carries; one ally takes Boost 1 on their next Action
9+Choose 2 from the above.
